channel.title: Singine Persona Governance Updates
channel.description: Operational updates for persona-driven log management and document processing.

item.title: PHIL philosopher scenario ready
item.description: Semantic analysis of logs and document evidence published to Collibra and SKOS.

item.title: GUAR guardian scenario ready
item.description: Risk triage workflow publishes governed log alerts.

item.title: EXPL explorer scenario ready
item.description: Discovery workflow proposes new code values and hierarchy branches.

item.title: HEAL healer scenario ready
item.description: Normalization workflow repairs malformed XML and publication feeds.

item.title: NETW networker scenario ready
item.description: Crosswalk and reference-data alignment across publication channels.
